heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 3012 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out this chapter.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Native American Graves Protection and Repatriation Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 101–601104 Stat. 3048section 3001 of this titleNov. 16, 1990
